evidence.claim: The system sorts the patient queue by urgency level ascending.
evidence.fact: It orders the waiting list so that higher-priority cases appear before lower-priority ones, with ties broken by time of entry.
evidence.user_story_span: the queue to be sorted first by urgency level (lowest number first)
evidence.fact_span: higher-priority cases appear before lower-priority ones

evidence.claim: The system sorts the patient queue by arrival time ascending.
evidence.fact: It orders the waiting list so that higher-priority cases appear before lower-priority ones, with ties broken by time of entry.
evidence.fact_span: ties broken by time of entry
